description_long: This object is a small bunch of bananas, consisting of five individual bananas still attached at the stem. The bananas have a smooth, slightly waxy yellow peel with a few brown spots and minor blemishes, indicating natural handling and ripening. The cluster is compact, with the bananas curving gently outward from the central stem, and the tips of the bananas are slightly darker, showing some minor bruising. The surface of the peel is mostly intact, with no visible tears or splits, and the bananas are closely packed together, making the bunch appear full and robust. The stem at the top is short and thick, with a greenish-brown hue, and the bottom ends of the bananas are slightly tapered. Overall, the bananas exhibit a typical appearance for fruit found in urban markets or on the street.
description: A compact bunch of five yellow bananas with minor brown spots and a smooth, intact peel. The bananas are closely attached at the stem and curve gently outward.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full bunch with all five bananas visible, highlighting the central stem and the close arrangement of the bananas.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the curvature of the bananas and the way they overlap, with the tips and sides more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the base of the bunch where the bananas connect, with the tips pointing outward and the stem less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the outermost bananas and their curvature, with the bottom tips and some surface blemishes visible.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peel is mostly smooth and intact, with a few minor brown spots and blemishes but no visible tears or splits. The surface shows some natural bruising and handling marks.
